PublisherPlus.description:
[h1]Kept You Waiting, Huh?[/h1]
Plays a custom sound effect when a pawn [b]joins your colony from outside the map[/b] — wanderer joins, refugee joins, event-based arrivals, etc.
[b]Does NOT[/b] trigger when a prisoner is recruited in-colony.
[h2]Optional Features[/h2] [list] [*] Sound when an orbital / comms-console trader contacts the colony (off by default) [*] Sound when a walk-in trader caravan arrives (off by default) [/list]
[h2]Configuration[/h2] All options (enable/disable, volume) are in [b]Options → Mod Settings → Kept You Waiting, Huh?[/b]
[h2]Audio Setup[/h2] The mod ships without an audio file. Place your own [b]pawn_joined.ogg[/b] (OGG Vorbis format) in: [code]Mods/kept_you_waiting_huh/Sounds/JoinSound/pawn_joined.ogg[/code]
[h2]Source Code[/h2] Available on GitHub: https://github.com/YourName/kept_you_waiting_huh
[h2]Compatible With[/h2] All mods — lightweight Harmony patch, no polling, no ticking.
[i]"Kept you waiting, huh?" — Solid Snake[/i]
